title: Mozzarella Boil Bites
description: A simple and delicious snack made with mozzarella cheese, easy to boil and enjoy.
instructions: 1. Fill a large pot with water and bring it to a boil.
2. Reduce the heat to a simmer and carefully add the mozzarella cheese.
3. Let it boil for 1-2 minutes or until the cheese is slightly softened.
4. Use a slotted spoon to remove the cheese from the water and place it on a plate.
